name: seo-os
description: SEO OS hosted dashboard - Cloudflare Worker serving the operator command center over D1, fed by a VPS Hermes worker.

scripts.deploy: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote && wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy:mine: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote -c wrangler.local.jsonc && wrangler deploy -c wrangler.local.jsonc
